context_for_next_testing_agent: All 9 features verified. Data unification fix is working correctly. Net worth figures match across all tabs. To test: 1) Personal mode: navigate to /dashboard, check Overview, Net Worth, Wealth Trends tabs. 2) Investments: navigate to /investments, check Overview and Rebalancing tabs. 3) Adviser mode: set localStorage app_mode='adviser' and selected_client=JSON with id 'thompson_family', navigate to /dashboard, check Profile tab. Compliance modal appears on first visit - dismiss by clicking 'I Understand'.
